weeks.focus: Reactivate. Marquee: Humphreys Peak. Add strength.

sessions.title: Lower — ME Circuit (WO #1)
sessions.notes: ME LEG PROGRESSION · WO #1 — Bodyweight. 6×10 each; finish all sets of an exercise before the next. Hold the tempos, don't rush. Rests: jumps 60s/set · Box Step-Ups & Lunges 30s/set · 60s between exercises.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.note: Quick feet, drive the knees to hip height.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.note: Full depth, controlled — grease the pattern.

exercises.name: Get-Ups
exercises.note: Up off the floor and back down, any method.

exercises.name: Split Jump Squat
exercises.note: ~1 jump/sec each leg. Explosive up, soft controlled landing.

exercises.name: Squat Jump
exercises.note: ~1 jump per ½–1 sec. Full extension, soft landing.

exercises.name: Box Step-Up
exercises.note: Box ≈75% of the height to the bottom of your kneecap. All R reps, then all L. ~1 rep/sec.

exercises.name: Front Lunge
exercises.note: Gentle 40–60 cm (16–24 in) step. All R, then all L. ~1 rep/sec. Hits the glutes hardest.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Volume
sessions.note: [Base · pull-up wk 1] VOLUME — 6×3. All sets submax, stop 0–1 reps before form breaks. Full dead hang, chin over bar. Rest ~2 min. Accessory: 3×4 slow negatives (5s lower) + 2×20s dead hang.

sessions.title: Easy Run
sessions.notes: From home — flat canal paths / neighborhood. Conversational Z2.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Tempo
sessions.note: [Base · pull-up wk 1] TEMPO — 4×3, 3s up / 1s hold / 3s down. Crisp and submax. Rest ~2 min. Accessory: 3×4 slow negatives (5s lower) + 2×20s dead hang.

sessions.title: Upper — Chest Focus
sessions.notes: Go hard — upper work doesn't cost the legs. Supersets (🔁) run back-to-back; rest only after the round.

exercises.name: DB Bench / Floor Press
exercises.note: Chest focus this week — drive these, leave 1 in the tank.

exercises.name: TRX Row
exercises.note: Back-to-back with the press, no rest between.

sessions.title: Flat Aerobic + Strides
sessions.notes: From home — flat canal paths / neighborhood. Easy Z2, finish with 6×20s relaxed strides.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Intensity
sessions.note: [Base · pull-up wk 1] INTENSITY — 1 all-out AMRAP, then 3 back-off sets at ~60% of that number. Stop 0–1 before failure on AMRAP. Rest ~2 min (3 min around AMRAP sets). Accessory: 3×4 slow negatives (5s lower) + 2×20s dead hang.

sessions.title: Humphreys Peak
sessions.notes: Season kickoff sustained climb. Steady hike-run, fuel every 30–45 min, never redline. Drink aggressively on the descent — 15-min timer, sip every beep, even when not thirsty.

sessions.title: Z2 Spin
sessions.notes: Optional aerobic flush on the cycling base. Skip if legs need rest before Saturday.

weeks.focus: Cutback from Humphreys. Easy aerobic + lift intro.

sessions.title: Pass Mountain Loop +
sessions.notes: Pass Mtn CCW (sustained ~700 ft section) + add a Wind Cave lap. Time on feet.

weeks.focus: Vertical block opens. More vert, more volume.

weeks.focus: NC travel (Jul 2–11). Deload — bodyweight + easy miles, maintain only.

sessions.title: Lower — Travel (Bodyweight)
sessions.notes: Travel week — bodyweight core four only (use a step/curb for step-ups; no vest/KB). Keep it easy. Resume the ME progression (~WO #6) when home — treat a fully missed week as 'drop back two.'

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.note: Quick feet, drive the knees to hip height.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.note: Full depth, controlled — grease the pattern.

exercises.name: Get-Ups
exercises.note: Up off the floor and back down, any method.

exercises.name: Front Lunge
exercises.note: Gentle 40–60 cm (16–24 in) step. All R, then all L. ~1 rep/sec. Hits the glutes hardest.

sessions.title: Easy Run
sessions.notes: Explore NC on foot. Easy Z2.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Volume
sessions.note: TRAVEL — do what you can. A bar is ideal; no bar = negatives off a sturdy edge + bands. [Build · pull-up wk 6] VOLUME — 7×4. All sets submax, stop 0–1 reps before form breaks. Full dead hang, chin over bar. Rest ~2 min. Accessory: 4×3 negatives + rows 4×8. Don't stress the desync — resume the progression when you're home.

sessions.title: Upper (Travel)
sessions.notes: Go hard — upper work doesn't cost the legs. Supersets (🔁) run back-to-back; rest only after the round.

exercises.name: Bent-Over / Chest-Supported Row
exercises.note: Heavy horizontal pull — vertical pulling is owned by the dedicated pull-up program.

exercises.name: DB Floor Press / Push-Up
exercises.note: Back-to-back with the row, no rest between.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

sessions.title: Easy Long
sessions.notes: Wherever you are in NC. Easy rolling, explore on foot. No structure — just move.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

sessions.title: Peralta → Fremont Saddle +
sessions.notes: First sustained climb. Pure trail to the saddle, extend past for more. Power-hike the steep, run the runnable. Full race nutrition: 60–90 g carb/hr (Tailwind + gels), 500–1000 mg sodium/hr.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Intensity
sessions.note: [Peak · TEST · pull-up wk 16] INTENSITY — Rest 3+ days before this. One all-out MAX TEST — record the number. Stop 0–1 before failure on AMRAP. Rest ~2 min (3 min around AMRAP sets). Accessory: none this week.

sessions.title: DRESS REHEARSAL — Siphon Draw + Peralta
sessions.notes: 3:30 AM headlamp start. ~8–10 hrs moving. Loaded vest 8–12 lb, race shoes, poles, lights. Run EVERYTHING exactly like race day: Full race nutrition: 60–90 g carb/hr (Tailwind + gels), 500–1000 mg sodium/hr. Drink aggressively on the descent — 15-min timer, sip every beep, even when not thirsty. Keep stopped time under 10%. This is the dry run that answers '16 vs 14.'

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

exercises.note: Back-to-back with the press, no rest between.

sessions.title: Flat Aerobic + Strides
sessions.notes: From home — flat canal paths / neighborhood. Easy Z2, finish with 6×20s relaxed strides.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Maintenance
sessions.note: Maintenance — 4×4 submax. Program's done; hold your gains, no testing during the race taper.

sessions.title: Long Run
sessions.notes: Shorter sustained climb. Stay crisp, don't chase fitness now — it's banked.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

weeks.focus: Deep taper. Stay loose, stay fresh.

sessions.title: Lower — Maintenance
sessions.notes: Lower maintenance — bodyweight, 3×10, easy. ME progression is complete; keep the patterns sharp without fatiguing the legs during the race taper.

exercises.name: High Knees
exercises.note: Quick feet, drive the knees to hip height.

exercises.name: Bodyweight Squats
exercises.note: Full depth, controlled — grease the pattern.

exercises.name: Get-Ups
exercises.note: Up off the floor and back down, any method.

exercises.name: Split Jump Squat
exercises.note: ~1 jump/sec each leg. Explosive up, soft controlled landing.

exercises.name: Squat Jump
exercises.note: ~1 jump per ½–1 sec. Full extension, soft landing.

exercises.name: Box Step-Up
exercises.note: Box ≈75% of the height to the bottom of your kneecap. All R reps, then all L. ~1 rep/sec.

exercises.name: Front Lunge
exercises.note: Gentle 40–60 cm (16–24 in) step. All R, then all L. ~1 rep/sec. Hits the glutes hardest.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Maintenance
sessions.note: Maintenance — 4×4 submax. Program's done; hold your gains, no testing during the race taper.

sessions.title: Easy Run
sessions.notes: From home — flat canal paths / neighborhood. Conversational Z2.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Maintenance (Tempo)
sessions.note: Maintenance — 3×4 tempo (3-1-3), submax and crisp. Program's done; hold your gains, no PR chasing during the race taper.

sessions.title: Upper — Back Focus
sessions.notes: Go hard — upper work doesn't cost the legs. Supersets (🔁) run back-to-back; rest only after the round.

exercises.name: Bent-Over / Chest-Supported Row
exercises.note: Heavy horizontal pull — vertical pulling is owned by the dedicated pull-up program.

exercises.name: DB Floor Press / Push-Up
exercises.note: Back-to-back with the row, no rest between.

sessions.title: Flat Aerobic + Strides
sessions.notes: From home — flat canal paths / neighborhood. Easy Z2, finish with 6×20s relaxed strides.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Maintenance
sessions.note: Maintenance — 4×4 submax. Program's done; hold your gains, no testing during the race taper.

sessions.title: Long Run
sessions.notes: Short and easy. Legs should feel springy by the end.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

weeks.focus: Race week. Travel, rest, execute.

sessions.title: Easy Run
sessions.notes: Shakeout — short and easy. Legs only, no vert. Final gear sort.

sessions.title: Pull-Ups — Easy
sessions.note: Race week — stay loose. 3×3 easy, optional. Everything's banked; save it for race day.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Travel to the canyon (lodging Tusayan / GC Village). Hydrate, carb-load, sleep.

sessions.title: Leg-Opener Shakeout
sessions.notes: 15–20 min very easy + a few strides. Stage all gear. Early to bed.

sessions.title: RACE DAY — R2R2R
sessions.notes: 16-hr target. SK down controlled (quad preservation) → respect the North Kaibab climb as the crux (hottest/longest) → return half is slower → win it on stopped-time discipline (<10%) and not blowing up the climb-out. Full race nutrition: 60–90 g carb/hr (Tailwind + gels), 500–1000 mg sodium/hr. Drink aggressively on the descent — 15-min timer, sip every beep, even when not thirsty. 100 mg caffeine pre-race; caffeinated gels saved for hour 8+.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Done. Eat, walk, celebrate.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.

sessions.title: Rest
sessions.notes: Full rest. Light mobility / stretch optional.
